generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors in physical system measuring temperature for thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements collected from sensor network"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, PredictiveModelingEnabler, BangBangControllerEnabler, SafetyMonitorEnabler, OptimalityMonitorEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model capturing structural attributes (e.g., chassis shape, wheel dimensions)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance ThermalDifferentialEquationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to describe thermal dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveModelingEnabler, BangBangControllerEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm updating model parameters using sensor data for calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic technique for fault detection processing sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic technique for supervisory control managing system operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic technique for state estimation of system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic technique for optimizing system performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance BangBangControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control algorithm enabling precise thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControllerService
]

instance PredictiveModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive modeling algorithm for forecasting temperature deviations"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveModelingService
]

instance SafetyMonitorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for monitoring system safety thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitorService
]

instance OptimalityMonitorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for monitoring system optimality"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalityMonitorService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating models using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParameters
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects faults in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing supervisory control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service estimating current system state"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedState
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing system parameters for performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParameters
]

instance BangBangControllerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature regulation via bang-bang controller for precise thermal control"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]

instance PredictiveModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureForecastInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring system safety thresholds"

]

instance OptimalityMonitorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring system optimality"

]

instance CalibratedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters after calibration process"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomaly indicating potential system fault"
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of system parameters by supervisory controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

instance OptimizedParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A framework integrating modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies where calibration algorithms update models using sensor data, monitors assess system safety and optimality, and decisions to modify the physical twin are triggered upon violation detection."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors assess system safety and operational optimality in real-time; detected violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to modify the Physical Twin and mitigate safety risks."
]
